title: Roasted Argentinian Wings Roast
description: Nutty, snappy midnight craving Argentinian dish featuring chicken wings, salt-bake, low-sodium-friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk olive oil, smoked paprika, cumin, garlic powder, dried oregano, salt, pepper, and lime juice until combined.
Pat chicken wings dry with paper towels.
Toss wings in the spice mixture until evenly coated.
Arrange wings in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet lined with parchment.
Roast for 35 minutes, turning once at 18 minutes, until skin is crisp and wings reach 165°F internal temperature.
While wings finish roasting, toast almonds in a dry skillet over medium heat until fragrant, about 3 minutes.
Remove wings from oven, sprinkle with toasted almonds and chopped parsley.
Serve immediately with a side of lemon wedges if desired.
Enjoy the nutty, snappy midnight craving dish!
